user.title: Navico Advertiser
user.description: Advertise Home Assistant or other local web apps to Navico/B&G/Simrad MFD browser panels.

init.title: Navico Advertiser Options
init.description: Update the advertised interface/IP and edit advertised sites as JSON. Services can also add, update, or remove sites at runtime.

error.sites_must_be_list: Sites must be a JSON list.
error.site_required_fields: Each site needs name, url, and icon.
error.duplicate_site_id: Each site id must be unique.
